data.name: CannotEditNonPendingOrder
data.value: Only pending orders can be edited.

data.name: ProducerAlreadyAssigned
data.value: A producer has already been assigned to this order.

data.name: OrderAlreadyCancelled
data.value: This order has already been cancelled.

data.name: OrderAlreadyDelivered
data.value: This order has already been delivered.
